MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
VB Examples

Magewell SDKv3 provides Visual Basic applications, which are in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\VisualBasic.

Console routines and GUI routines are currently available, located at:

  1. Console Examples: SDKv3\Examples\VisualBasic\CmdTools
  2. GUI Examples: SDKv3\Examples\VisualBasic\GUI

VisualBasic Overview

The VB examples are developed by importing dll files in SDKv3 through DllImport and calling the functions of SDKv3 by declaring the function prototype and related data structure.

...
<StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, CharSet:=CharSet.Ansi, Pack:=1)> _
Public Structure MWCAP_SDI_ANC_PACKET
Dim byDID As Byte
Dim bySDID As Byte
Dim byDC As Byte
<MarshalAsAttribute(UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst:=255, ArraySubType:=UnmanagedType.I4)> _
Dim abyUDW() As Byte
<MarshalAsAttribute(UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst:=2, ArraySubType:=UnmanagedType.I4)> _
Dim abyReserved() As Byte
End Structure
...
#If DEBUG Then
<DllImport("LibMWCaptured.dll", CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.Cdecl)> Public Shared Function MWCaptureGetSDIANCPacket(ByVal hChannel As IntPtr, ByRef pPacket As MWCAP_SDI_ANC_PACKET) As MW_RESULT
End Function
#Else
<DllImport("LibMWCapture.dll", CallingConvention:=CallingConvention.Cdecl)> Public Shared Function MWCaptureGetSDIANCPacket(ByVal hChannel As IntPtr, ByRef pPacket As MWCAP_SDI_ANC_PACKET) As MW_RESULT
End Function
...

Current VB examples includes some functions of LibMWCapture library and audio and video render functions.

  1. Some functions of LibMWCapture library are defined in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\C#\GUI\VisualBasic\Common\LibMWCapture\LibMWCapture.vb
  2. Audio and video render functions are located at SDKv3\Examples\C#\GUI\VisualBasic\Common\LibMWMedia\LibMWMedia.vb

Console Examples

  1. AudioCaptureVB

    It demonstrates how to use the APIs of Pro/Eco Capture Family Universal Functions to capture audio data. It has the same function and logic as AudioCapture Example C++.

    AudioCaptureVB

  2. CaptureByInputVB

    It demonstrates how to use the APIs of Pro Capture Family Functions to capture video data. It has the same function and logic as CaptureByInput C++.

    CaptureByInputVB

  3. CaptureByTimerVB

    It demonstrates how to use the APIs of Pro Capture Family Functions to capture video data. It has the same function and logic as CaptureByTimer C++.

    CaptureByTimerVB

  4. GetANCPacketVB

    It demonstrates how to use the APIs of Pro/Eco Capture Family Universal Functions to capture ANC data. It has the same function and logic as GetANCPacket C++.

    GetANCPacketVB

  5. HDMIInfoFrameVB

    It demonstrates how to capture HDMI infoframe. It has the same function and logic as HDMIInfoFrame C++.

    HDMIInfoFrameVB

  6. InputSignalVB

    It demonstrates how to get input audio and video data format. It has the same function and logic as InputSignal C++.

    InputSignalVB

  7. InputSourceVB

    It demonstrates how to get input number of sources and current input source. It has the same function and logic as InputSource C++.

    InputSourceVB

  8. USBDeviceDetectVB

    It demonstrates how to detect USB Gen2/Plus hotplug state. It has the same function and logic as USBDeviceDetect C++.

    USBDeviceDetectVB

GUI Examples

  1. AVCaptureVB demonstrates how to use the APIs of Pro Capture Family Functions and Eco Capture Family Functions to capture and render audio and video. It has the same function and logic as AVCapture C++.

    AVCaptureVB

  2. AVCapture2VB demonstrates how to use the APIs of Universal Functions to capture and render audio and video. It has the same function and logic as AVCapture2 C++.

    AVCapture2VB
